entities.summary: Simple weight copy from checkpoint tensor to model parameter

detail.name: default_weight_loader
detail.description: Default strategy: direct copy. Specialized loaders override for sharding/merging.

teaches.explain: Define family of algorithms (weight loading strategies), make them interchangeable. Default strategy is simple copy; parallel layers override with shard logic.

entities.summary: Load all model weights from checkpoint file into model

detail.name: load_model
detail.description: Iterates checkpoint tensors, matches to model parameters, calls each layers weight_loader.

teaches.explain: Open checkpoint → iterate saved tensors → find matching parameter by name → call layer-specific loader. Decouples storage format from model structure.
